session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's the summary:
**PR #8775**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8775
**Changes across 11 files** (plus 2 auto-generated index files):
- **Node 6.1** (4 files): `lifecycle.md` (7 fixes), `session-deduplication.md` (1), `pr-submission-patterns.md` (2), `learn-workflow.md` (14 fixes) - **Node 6.2** (7 files): `label-scheme.md` (3), `metadata-block-fallback.md` (6), `learn-vs-implementation-plans.md` (3), `planned-pr-backend.md` (3), `plan-creation-pathways.md` (1), `plan-execution-patterns.md` (2), `metadata-field-workflow.md` (1)
All instances of "plan issue" in the targeted files have been replaced with "plan", matching the "plan-as-PR" terminology standardization. Metadata field names like `learn_plan_issue` and `learned_from_issue` were correctly left unchanged since they're code identifiers. The `--plan-issue` CLI flag was updated to `--learn-plan` per PR #8580. Auto-generated `index.md` and `tripwires.md` were regenerated via `erk docs sync`. All CI checks pass.
